question: How does the `--enable-impeller` flag work on Android, and what is the rollout status?
answer: Set `<meta-data android:name="io.flutter.embedding.android.EnableImpeller" android:value="true" />` (or pass `--enable-impeller` to `flutter run`) to opt in. Starting with Flutter 3.27, Impeller is the *default* on Android with Vulkan; the OpenGLES backend remains for older devices. To opt out during migration: set the same meta-data to `false`. Always test on real low-end devices in addition to your dev devices.
